title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Economics of AGI episode exploring how AI economic gains should be taxed, redistributed, and indexed by developing nations. Discusses whether inequality must worsen and what remains scarce post-AGI, framed through economic first principles rather than intuitions.
